_comment: A2 wave 2 (2026-05-29 resume): Groq-70B + 3 parallel norwegian-linguist passes over 6 concepts (168 candidates → 97 KEEP, ~58%). Linguist caught wrong-gender articles (en fjernsyn/legekontor/bagasjerom), Danisms (sjov/venlig/håndtaske/bildebook), analytic-vs-synthetic comparative errors (mer stor/mer dyr → større/dyrere), reflexives mistagged as object-pronouns, fragment relative clauses, polite-questions mistagged as imperatives, å+imperative form errors. Periods + igår normalized on seed.
remaining: 15 A2 concepts got 0 this run (Groq TPM saturated after 6 concepts) — re-generate: infinitive-clauses, conditional-clauses, reflexive-verbs, passive-voice, preterite-irregular-advanced, time-expressions, sentence-adverbials, genitive, future-constructions, conjunctions, modal-verbs-advanced, superlative-adjectives, subordinate-clauses, advanced-prepositions, indirect-speech
